description: PromptOS AI-First Dynamic Linux Bootstrap Framework PromptOS is a minimal, TUI-driven installer bootstrap that uses live LLM calls (via user-provided API keys from providers like OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, or local Ollama) to generate personalized, hardware-aware Linux installations on the fly.
